CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Jonathan Seigel, Esq. for Plaintiff: LEM/RAY Properties, LLC., a California limited liability company,
Plaintiff's witness: Duke Alegre, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Lease agreement ------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Circle of Friends, Inc., a California Corporation as follows:
$19,031.28 acknowledged credit applied to principal of $34,134.56
Balance of Principal in the amount of $15,103.28
Attorney's Fees $1,575.00
Costs $327.50 for a total of $17,005.78
Judgment submitted, to be reviewed today.

1:30 P.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2004 Continued To Feb-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
